The '''Mogo tree''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tenupe]]'s [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]]. The trees were broad-limbed and could grow to more than 100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height, allowing them to form a thick canopy. During the [[Battle of Tenupe]],<ref name="Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia" /> which marked the end of the [[Swarm War]] between the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] and [[The Colony|Killik colonies]]<ref name="Complete Star Wars EncyclopediaII">{{CSWECite|III|201|Swarm War}}</ref>, the Ascendancy used [[Defoliator/Legends|defoliants]] on Tenupe's jungles, killing many mogo trees.<ref name="Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
